PreceptDef.label: groundbreaking ceremony
PreceptDef.description: A ceremony led by the Surveyor to mark the beginning of a major project. Participants receive a mood boost based on the quality of the ceremony.

PreceptDef.label: opening of the line
PreceptDef.description: A ceremony led by the Surveyor to celebrate the completion of a road or railway. Best performed after successfully connecting two points on the world map. Participants receive a mood boost based on the quality of the ceremony.
